atten4.ptxt: Parameters listed in the chart may be different than your readings depending on the type of instrument and other factors.
If any DTCs are displayed during a check mode DTC check, check the circuit for the DTCs listed in the table below. For details of each DTC, refer to the page indicated.

entry.ptxt: 1. Open or short in Oil Control Valve (OCV) circuit
Camshaft Position "A" - Timing Over-Advanced or System Performance (Bank 1)
Crankshaft Position - Camshaft Position Correlation (Bank 1 Sensor A)
1. Mechanical system (Timing chain has jumped tooth or chain stretched)
Oxygen (A/F) Sensor Heater Control Circuit Low (Bank 1 Sensor 1)
1. Open in Air-Fuel Ratio (A/F) sensor heater circuit
Oxygen (A/F) Sensor Heater Control Circuit High (Bank 1 Sensor 1)
1. Short in A/F sensor heater circuit
Oxygen Sensor Heater Control Circuit Low (Bank 1 Sensor 2)
1. Open in Heated Oxygen (HO2) sensor heater circuit
Oxygen Sensor Heater Control Circuit High (Bank 1 Sensor 2)
1. Short in HO2 sensor heater circuit
Mass or Volume Air Flow Circuit
1. Open or short in Mass Air Flow (MAF) meter circuit
Mass Air Flow Circuit Range / Performance Problem
Mass or Volume Air Flow Circuit Low Input
1. Open or short in MAF meter circuit
Mass or Volume Air Flow Circuit High Input
1. Open or short in MAF meter circuit
1. Open or short in Intake Air Temperature (IAT) sensor circuit
Intake Air Temperature Sensor Gradient Too High
Intake Air Temperature Circuit Low Input
Intake Air Temperature Circuit High Input
1. Open or short in Engine Coolant Temperature (ECT) sensor circuit
Engine Coolant Temperature Circuit Range / Performance Problem
Engine Coolant Temperature Circuit Low Input
Engine Coolant Temperature Circuit High Input
Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch "A" Circuit Malfunction
1. Throttle Position (TP) sensor (built into throttle body)
Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch "A" Circuit Range / Performance Problem
Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch "A" Circuit Low Input
Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch "A" Circuit High Input
4. Short between VC and VTA1 circuits
Insufficient Coolant Temperature for Closed Loop Fuel Control
Coolant Thermostat (Coolant Temperature Below Thermostat Regulating Temperature)
1. Open or short in HO2 sensor (sensor 2) circuit
Oxygen Sensor Circuit Low Voltage (Bank 1 Sensor 2)
Oxygen Sensor Circuit High Voltage (Bank 1 Sensor 2)
Oxygen Sensor Heater Circuit Malfunction (Bank 1 Sensor 2)
1. Open or short in HO2 sensor heater circuit
7. Open or short in A/F sensor (sensor 1) circuit
11. A/F sensor heater and EFI relay circuits
7. Open or short in A/F sensor (sensor 1) circuit
11. A/F sensor heater and EFI relay circuits
Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch "B" Circuit
Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch "B" Circuit Low Input
Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch "B" Circuit High Input
4. Short between VC and VTA2 circuits
1. Open or short in engine wire harness
Knock Sensor 1 Circuit Low Input (Bank 1 or Single Sensor)
Knock Sensor 1 Circuit High Input (Bank 1 or Single Sensor)
1. Open or short in Crankshaft Position (CKP) sensor circuit
Camshaft Position Sensor "A" Circuit (Bank 1 or Single Sensor)
1. Open or short in Camshaft Position (CMP) sensor circuit
2. Open or short in IGF1 or IGT circuit (1 to 4) between ignition coil with igniter and ECM
3. No. 1 to No. 4 ignition coils with igniters
1. Front exhaust pipe (with Three-Way Catalytic Converter)
Evaporative Emission System Reference Orifice Clog Up
1. Canister pump module (Reference orifice, leak detection pump, vent valve)
3. EVAP system hose (pipe from air inlet port to canister pump module, canister filter, fuel tank vent hose)
Evaporative Emission System Reference Orifice High Flow
Evaporative Emission Control System Incorrect Purge Flow
5. Leakage from EVAP line (Purge VSV Intake manifold)
Evaporative Emission Control System Pressure Sensor / Switch
2. EVAP system hose (pipe from air inlet port to canister pump module, canister filter, fuel tank vent hose)
Evaporative Emission Control System Pressure Sensor Range / Performance
3. EVAP system hose (pipe from air inlet port to canister pump module, canister filter, fuel tank vent hose)
Evaporative Emission Control System Pressure Sensor / Switch Low Input
Evaporative Emission Control System Pressure Sensor / Switch High Input
Evaporative Emission Control System Leak Detected (Gross Leak)
2. Leakage from EVAP line (Canister Fuel tank)
3. Leakage from EVAP line (Purge VSV Canister)
Evaporative Emission Control System Leak Detected (Very Small Leak)
1. Open or short in speed signal circuit
1. Short in stop light switch signal circuit
Cold Start Idle Air Control System Performance
1. Open in back up power source circuit
Internal Control Module Random Access Memory (RAM) Error
VIN not Programmed or Mismatch - ECM / PCM
1. Short in stop light switch circuit
Intake Manifold Runner Control Stuck Open (Bank 1)
1. Intake manifold runner valve (IMRV) motor circuit
Intake Manifold Runner Control Stuck Closed (Bank 1)
Intake Manifold Runner Control Circuit Low (Bank 1)
Intake Manifold Runner Control Circuit High (Bank 1)
Intake Manifold Runner Position Sensor / Switch Circuit (Bank 1)
1. Open or short in IMRV position sensor circuit
Intake Manifold Runner Position Sensor / Switch Circuit Low (Bank 1)
Intake Manifold Runner Position Sensor / Switch Circuit High (Bank 1)
Throttle Actuator Control Motor Circuit Low
Throttle Actuator Control Motor Circuit High
Throttle Actuator Control System - Stuck Open
Throttle Actuator Control System - Stuck Closed
Throttle Actuator Control Motor Current Range / Performance
1. Open in ETCS power source circuit
Throttle Actuator Control Throttle Body Range / Performance
Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch "D" Circuit
Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch "D" Circuit Range / Performance
Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch "D" Circuit Low Input
3. Open or ground short in VPA circuit
Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch "D" Circuit High Input
Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch "E" Circuit
Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch "E" Circuit Low Input
3. Open or ground short in VPA2 circuit
Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch "E" Circuit High Input
Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch "A" / "B" Voltage Correlation
1. Short between VTA1 and VTA2 circuits
Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch "D" / "E" Voltage Correlation
1. Short between VPA and VPA2 circuits
Oxygen (A/F) Sensor Signal Stuck Lean (Bank 1 Sensor 1)
1. Open or short in A/F sensor (sensor 1) circuit
5. A/F sensor heater and EFI relay circuits
Oxygen (A/F) Sensor Signal Stuck Rich (Bank 1 Sensor 1)
Oxygen (A/F) Sensor Pumping Current Circuit / Open (Bank 1 Sensor 1)
1. Open or short in A/F sensor (sensor 1) circuit
Oxygen (A/F) Sensor Pumping Current Circuit Low (Bank 1 Sensor 1)
1. Open or short in A/F sensor (sensor 1) circuit
Oxygen (A/F) Sensor Pumping Current Circuit High (Bank 1 Sensor 1)
1. Open or short in A/F sensor (sensor 1) circuit
Oxygen (A/F) Sensor Reference Ground Circuit Low (Bank 1 Sensor 1)
1. Open or short in A/F sensor (sensor 1) circuit
Oxygen (A/F) Sensor Reference Ground Circuit High (Bank 1 Sensor 1)
1. Open or short in A/F sensor (sensor 1) circuit
Evaporative Emission Leak Detection Pump Stuck OFF
1. Canister pump module (Reference orifice, leak detection pump, vent valve)
3. EVAP system hose (pipe from air inlet port to canister pump module, canister filter, fuel tank vent hose)
Evaporative Emission Leak Detection Pump Stuck ON
Evaporative Emission System Switching Valve Control Circuit Low
1. Canister pump module (Reference orifice, leak detection pump, vent valve)
3. EVAP system hose (pipe from air inlet port to canister pump module, canister filter, fuel tank vent hose)
Evaporative Emission System Switching Valve Control Circuit High
1. Canister pump module (Reference orifice, leak detection pump, vent valve)
ECM / PCM Internal Engine Off Timer Performance
A/F Sensor Circuit Slow Response (Bank 1 Sensor 1)
1. Open or short in A/F sensor circuit

content5.ptxt: *1: Blinks when terrible misfire is detected.
